name: fyn-mcp-server
title: Fyn Property Search
description: Public, rate-limited Streamable HTTP MCP server for normalized property search across Spanish real-estate portals.

tools.name: search_properties
tools.title: Search properties

resources.description: Interactive map and property cards for MCP Apps-compatible clients.
